_meta.schema: core.schemas.Estimate (with line_items=list[CostLine] populated from W50S7626QA001 CLIN structure pre-pricing)
_meta.note_on_shape: Two CLINs only (Section B of SF 1442). Each CLIN priced as Quantity 1 Job Firm Fixed Price; the Government may award one without the other (Section L (a)(1)). The line_items below break down the trade-by-trade takeoff INSIDE each CLIN — these decompositions are internal-cost-tracking only and are NOT included in the submission. The submission is a 2-line Schedule of Prices (CLIN 0001 + CLIN 0002 + Total) per Section L (a)(1).
_meta.project_name: Alter Command Post and NDI Room — W50S7626QA001
_meta.amendment: W50S7626QA0010001 (effective ~2026-05-12; only modified DFARS 252.236-7001 drawings index, did not change Block 13 closing date)
_meta.owner_contracting_agency: 136th Airlift Wing Mission Support Contracting (TXANG, NOT TXARNG)
_meta.installation_host: NAS Fort Worth Joint Reserve Base (Navy installation command, hosting Joint Reserve Base)
buildings: B1672 (new Command Post location — relocated FROM B4175)
B1675 (new NDI Room — converted from decommissioned AFFF room)
_meta.naics_note: [VERIFY VS SOL COVER PAGE] — not extracted from PDF text layer; almost certainly 236220 Commercial and Institutional Building Construction based on PSC + scope.
_meta.evaluation_method: FAR 12.203(c)(2) Comparative Evaluation, no objective standards — NOT LPTA
_meta.magnitude_basis: Top-down per 05-bid-schedule-mapping.md §D: B1672 ~1500–2500 SF × $180–$280/SF (secure-area federal renovation); B1675 ~400–800 SF × $130–$220/SF (standard federal renovation + AFFF environmental contingency).
_meta.period_basis: Per CLIN, from NTP receipt (SF 1442 Section F.0001 + F.0002)
_meta.ntp_start_basis: [VERIFY VS SF 1442 ITEM 11] — likely standard 10 cal days post-NTP
_meta.proposal_due_basis: SF 1442 Block 13 PDF form-field value: '04 JUN 2026'. Hour [VERIFY VS BLOCK 13 — likely 1500 CDT].
_meta.rfi_cutoff_basis: [VERIFY VS SAM.GOV NOTICE] — Section L (f) refers to 'date and time stated on the solicitation (SAM.gov) notice'.
_meta.site_visit_basis: Not on a fixed schedule. SOW §4.3 says 'urged' (not mandatory); 14 BUSINESS DAYS advance request rule per SOW §7 makes pre-bid site visit difficult — see 09-nas-jrb-site-access.md.
submission_required_attachments: Schedule of Prices (CLIN 0001 + CLIN 0002 + total) firm-fixed
List of equipment, materials, and labor disciplines (RSMeans-style export) — Subfactor 1
Project schedule (90-day Gantt, both CLINs) — Subfactor 2
Bid bond SF 24 (scanned) — if Block 13B = YES
Acknowledgment of Amendment 0001 (Block 19 of SF 1442 OR returned SF 30)
_meta.wage_determination: TX20260270 (Tarrant County, Building Construction, Modification 0, dated 01/02/2026, supersedes TX20250270)
_meta.region_multiplier_note: Tarrant County / Fort Worth (DFW Metroplex) typically clears at ~0.95–1.02 of national RSMeans CCI. Carry 1.0 until confirmed.
_meta.contingency_pct_clin_0001_note: Mid of 3–5% range — secure-area scope unknowns + MEP modification unknowns. See 07-risk-register.md.
_meta.contingency_pct_clin_0002_note: Mid of 8–12% range — Sheet 2 of 2 visual review pending + AFFF residue handling unknown. Drop to 5% after Sheet 2 + AFFF clarification.
_meta.profit_pct_note: Comparative-evaluation (NOT LPTA) allows mid-to-upper margin if past-perf + technical strength carry the comparative ranking. See 06-evaluation-strategy.md §B §C.
_meta.fill_instructions: Each CLIN below has 'subline_items' showing the trade-by-trade decomposition for internal cost tracking. Populate unit_cost from RSMeans (CSI section noted) or sub quotes. Sub quotes are required for CLIN 0001 sublines: secure doors+hardware, electrical, mechanical/HVAC. CLIN 0002 sublines may need a fire-protection sub. After populating, sum each CLIN's sublines, apply contingency + field OH + GCs + bonds + insurance + home-office OH + profit per the markup envelope in 05-bid-schedule-mapping.md §C, and roll up to a single firm-fixed price per CLIN.

project_name: Alter Command Post and NDI Room — W50S7626QA001

line_items.description: Building 1672 Command Post Relocation — turnkey interior renovation (mantrap, secure-area construction, full MEP modification, finishes, photo-studio decommissioning + relocation)
line_items.cost_source: Rollup of subline_items below + markup envelope per 05-bid-schedule-mapping.md §C
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: 1 lump-sum job. Internal decomposition tracks ~36 trade-scope elements (see 04-scope-of-work.md §E and subline_items below).
line_items.spec_requirements: Per SOW + Plans Sheet A-1 + UFC 1-200-01 + UFC 3-101-01 + UFC 3-501-01 + UFC 3-600-01 + UFC 4-010-01 + UPC + AFI 32-1054. Stanley/Best Lock-Core compatible hardware. Paint SW1016 Silver Screen. VCT AZrock Shale Gray V-866. Carpet Shaw Contract Clear Tile #59564 Moonstone 62500.
line_items.notes: Rollup line. See subline_items below for the internal decomposition and sub-quote gaps.

subline_items.description: Selective demo (sound-deadening, partitions, cabinets, photo studio rack/lighting)
Photo backdrop relocation to B1669 Rm 112 + back-brace fab
Metal-stud partition framing full-height to deck
5/8" GWB both sides, mud + tape + texture
Double-layer 5/8" GWB above ceiling at secure-space adjacencies
Solid-wood doors with steel-sheet exterior reinforcement + frames + Stanley/Best Lock-Core hardware
Mantrap electronic-lock kit (remote unlock, manual override, fail-locked, anti-tailgate logic) + empty conduit/box for future card-entry
Door alarm on emergency exit + sound-proof seal
Credential window: framed penetration + impact-rated mesh-reinforced 1-way glazing + trim
Base cabinets + overhead cabinets + counters (replace, new dimensions, Govt approval required)
Sink replacement + relocation in new cabinet layout
VCT (AZrock Shale Gray V-866)
Carpet tile (Shaw Contract Clear Tile #59564 Moonstone 62500)
Rubber cove base (match existing)
Paint SW1016 Silver Screen (walls + doors + trim)
Drop-ceiling grid + tile modification + alignment
20A/120V receptacles (general 16" AFF + 72" AFF + GFCI 12" AC)
Light fixtures 2x4 drop-ceiling LED (match existing)
Occupancy sensors + mantrap-special switch logic
Battery-backup emergency lights + exit signs
Emergency Action Processing rotating light + 'Classified Work in Progress' signage + console-room switch
Fire-alarm strobes (synchronized, tested)
Comm conduit + box + pull-string rough-in (¾" EMT to above ceiling) at receptacles, TVs, security cams, wall phones
Add supply diffuser
Add return grates
Duct modification (split-off + new run)
HVAC override button + integration to existing controls (BMS platform [VERIFY])
Anti-access bars on supply ducting + returns (Drawing General Note 11)
HVAC test + balance + report (NEBB or AABC certified)
Fire-suppression modification (heads + branch piping) for new partitions
Site fencing + lockable gate + Govt-approved storage area + daily clearout + FOD plan
Demolition debris disposal at appropriately permitted facility
PM + Safety Manager + QC + Submittals (AF 3000) + Schedule + Closeout (AF 66)

line_items.description: Building 1675 NDI Room — conversion of decommissioned AFFF room to NDI-suitable space (interior renovation; Govt installs NDI equipment post-renovation)
line_items.cost_source: Rollup of subline_items below + markup envelope per 05-bid-schedule-mapping.md §C
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: 1 lump-sum job. Internal decomposition tracks ~18 trade-scope elements; refine after visual review of Sheet 2.
line_items.spec_requirements: Per SOW + Plans Sheet 2 + UFC 1-200-01 + UFC 3-101-01 + UFC 3-501-01 + UFC 3-600-01. AFFF / PFAS-impacted-substrate handling per 30 TAC §335 + RCRA + 136 Environmental Office coordination.
line_items.notes: Sheet 2 visual review pending — some sublines will refine. AFFF residue handling [VERIFY VS RFI #5]. Carry +10% scope-uncertainty contingency until Sheet 2 + AFFF clarification confirmed.

subline_items.description: Selective demo of decommissioned AFFF room interior
PFAS-conscious waste collection + labeling + 136 Env Office coordination (if AFFF residue present)
subline_items.qty_note: [VERIFY VS RFI #5 — if TCEQ-permit needed, switch to specialty environmental sub]

subline_items.description: Metal-stud partition framing
5/8" GWB
Doors + frames + standard hardware (no mantrap; standard interior)
Floor finish [VERIFY VS SHEET 2 — likely VCT or sealed concrete or epoxy depending on NDI methods]
Paint SW1016 (assumed)
Drop-ceiling grid + tile (if shown on Sheet 2)
Receptacles + dedicated circuits
Light fixtures (high-output for visual NDI inspection)
Emergency lighting + exit signs
Fire-alarm strobes
HVAC modification (diffuser + return + ductwork [VERIFY VS SHEET 2])
HVAC test + balance + report
Plumbing [VERIFY: wash sink / floor drain handling for AFFF legacy floor drain]
Fire-suppression modification (if needed by partition changes)
Disposal (incl. PFAS-conscious if applicable)
PM + Safety + QC + Submittals + Schedule + Closeout (allocation share for CLIN 0002)
